pageTitle: Making an offer to pay your arrears
caption: Respond to a property possession claim
heading: Making an offer to pay your arrears
paragraph1: From your previous answers, you have not come to any arrangement with {{claimantName}} to pay off your rent arrears.
paragraph2: You can offer to pay off your arrears in instalments and say how much you'd be able to afford to pay and how frequently.
paragraph3: At the hearing, the judge will look at your offer and the details of your income and expenses you choose to share. They will decide if your offer is affordable.
paragraph4: You'll be able to tell the judge if the amount you can afford to pay has changed.
question: Would you like to offer to pay your arrears in instalments?

errors.confirmInstalmentOffer: Select whether you would like to offer to pay your arrears in instalments
